'''jahama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygopagus|pygopagus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygopagus|pygopagus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jahama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæhæmæth|jæhæmæth]] || [[word:jæhæmæj|jæhæmæj]] || [[word:jæhæmæsh|jæhæmæsh]] || [[word:jæhæmæ|jæhæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahahamath|jahahamath]] || [[word:jahahamaj|jahahamaj]] || [[word:jahahamash|jahahamash]] || [[word:jahahama|jahahama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahamath|jahamath]] || [[word:jahamaj|jahamaj]] || [[word:jahamash|jahamash]] || [[word:jahama|jahama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahafmath|jahafmath]] || [[word:jahafmaj|jahafmaj]] || [[word:jahafmash|jahafmash]] || [[word:jahafmaf|jahafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jahamatha|jahamatha]] || [[word:jahamaja|jahamaja]] || [[word:jahamasha|jahamasha]] || [[word:jahamaka|jahamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jahamath|jahamath]] || [[word:jahamaj|jahamaj]] || [[word:jahamash|jahamash]] || [[word:jahama|jahama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jahamathal|jahamathal]] || [[word:jahamajal|jahamajal]] || [[word:jahamashal|jahamashal]] || [[word:jahamakal|jahamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jahamathatha|jahamathatha]] || [[word:jahamajaja|jahamajaja]] || [[word:jahamashasha|jahamashasha]] || [[word:jahamaka|jahamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jahamathan|jahamathan]] || [[word:jahamajan|jahamajan]] || [[word:jahamashan|jahamashan]] || [[word:jahamakan|jahamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jahamathaoro|jahamathaoro]] || [[word:jahamajaoro|jahamajaoro]] || [[word:jahamashaoro|jahamashaoro]] || [[word:jahamakaoro|jahamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
